zh.lifeSummary: James Aucher是John Aucher和Margaret Alice Church的兒子，於1470年出生在英國英格蘭肯特奧特爾登。他於1490年與Alice Hill在英國英格蘭肯特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1509年1月8日在英國肯特奧特爾登享年39歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特奧特爾登。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: James Aucher是John Aucher和Margaret Alice Church的儿子，于1470年出生在英国英格兰肯特奧特爾登。他于1490年与Alice Hill在英国英格兰肯特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1509年1月8日在英国肯特奧特爾登享年39岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特奧特爾登。

nameMeanings.name: Aucher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name for someone from Taucha near Leipzig or from Tauche on the Spree river, derived from a Slavic placename element, Tuch-.
South German: topographic name from dialect Dauch ‘wetland, swamp’.

Americanized form of Slovenian Tavčer, itself a variant of Tavčar, which may be an old Slovenized form of the German ethnic name Deutscher ‘German’, or alternatively an altered form of Davčar, a habitational name for someone from the village of Davča.

variants.name: Deutscher
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Hertha, Kurt, Siegmund.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of Deutsch , with -er strong adjective ending.

variants.name: Tauer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Alois, Erwin.
German (Silesia): habitational name from any of the places called Tauer or Thauer.
North German: occupational name for a tanner.

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

en.lifeSummary: James Aucher was born in 1470, in Otterden, Kent, England, United Kingdom as the son of John Aucher and Margaret Alice Church. He married Alice Hill in 1490, in Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 8 January 1509, in Otterden, Kent, England, at the age of 39, and was buried in Otterden, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: James Aucher est né en 1470, à Otterden, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de John Aucher et Margaret Alice Church. Il a épousé Alice Hill en 1490, à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 8 janvier 1509, à Otterden, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterré à Otterden, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: James Aucher wurde 1470 in Otterden, Kent, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von John Aucher und Margaret Alice Church geboren. Er hat 1490 in Kent, England, United Kingdom Alice Hill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 8. Januar 1509 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Otterden, Kent, England und wurde in Otterden, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: James Aucher è nato il nel 1470 nel Otterden, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di John Aucher e Margaret Alice Church. Lui sposato Alice Hill nel 1490, nel Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 8 gennaio 1509, nel Otterden, Kent, England, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolto a Otterden, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: James Aucherは1470年にイギリスイギリスケントオッテルデンでJohn AucherとMargaret Alice Churchの息子として生まれた。1490年にイギリスイギリスケントでAlice Hillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1509年1月8日にイギリスケントオッテルデンで39歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントオッテルデンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: James Aucher(은)는 1470년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 오터든에서 John Aucher(와)과 Margaret Alice Church의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1490년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에서 Alice Hill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1509년 1월 8일 영국 켄트 오터든에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 오터든에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: James Aucher nasceu em 1470, em Otterden, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de John Aucher e Margaret Alice Church. Ele casou-se com Alice Hill em 1490, em Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de janeiro de 1509, em Otterden, Kent, Inglaterra, com 39 anos, e foi sepultado em Otterden, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: James Aucher родился в 1470 г. в местности оттирден, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали John Aucher и Margaret Alice Church. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Hill в 1490 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 8 января 1509 г. в местности оттирден, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 39 лет и был похоронен в местности оттирден, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: James Aucher nació en 1470, en Otterden, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de John Aucher y Margaret Alice Church. Se casó con Alice Hill en 1490, en Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 8 de enero de 1509, en Otterden, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultado en Otterden, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
